description: Browser window displaying the 'Proctoring Test Page' with a consent message for screen recording. Options to 'Skip Recording' or 'Continue with Recording' are visible.

IDE with a file named 'test-assessment-generation.ipynb' open. The notebook contains a detailed description of the assessment generation process, with the first section titled 'Step 1 output' explaining requirements extraction.

Same IDE view as previous frame, with additional content visible in the 'test-assessment-generation.ipynb' notebook. The text discusses various setup steps, including installing Jupyter and running a server using npm commands. The right panel displays a chat interface with ongoing discussions.
